content_hash_semantics.algorithm: SHA256(schema + NUL + width:uint64be + height:uint64be + Pillow-decoded RGB pixel bytes in row-major order)
content_hash_semantics.pair_algorithm: SHA256(pair-schema + NUL + binary decoded-RGB input digest + binary decoded-RGB GT digest)

dataset_file_list_fingerprint.algorithm: SHA256 over UTF-8 JSON lines [root-relative-path, byte-size, kind], sorted by root-relative path bytes

manifest_generation.reason: Audit passed and all formal split manifests were written.

non_rgb_policy.default_failure_condition: A pair fails only if either image cannot be fully decoded and converted to RGB; convertible L, RGBA, and other modes are recorded as warnings.

sample_id_semantics: Exact filename stem; stem comparison is case-sensitive.
